Title: Encountered a synchronization issue with Cisco Umbrella on MSOC-L005, MSOC-L007, and MSOC-L012.
Notes:
• Logged in remotely to MSOC-L005, MSOC-L007, and MSOC-L012 via Backstage to investigate the issue.
    • Verified the Cisco Umbrella configuration and synchronized the settings.
    • Performed necessary steps to ensure the system synced correctly with the Cisco Umbrella servers.
  • Resolution: The synchronization issue was resolved after reconfiguring and verifying the connection. All machines are now properly synchronized.
  • Confirmation: After testing, confirmed that all systems were functioning as expected.

Priority: High

Title: My Remote version 26.1.22.9573 updated on machine MSOC-L005,MSOC-L006,MSOC-L009,MSOC-L010
Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine MSOC-L005,MSOC-L006,MSOC-L009,MSOC-L010
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So deployed the agent from manage engine and reinstalled the latest version 26.1.22.9573. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest
version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

Title: Inky reconfiguration for ACU
Notes: Investigated and remediated an INKY deployment issue for client ACU where reinstallation of the service was failing due to tenant group membership restrictions. Engaged with INKY support to review the error related to the IPW-Group-Silent group and confirmed that a reinstall was required instead of a simple reconfiguration. Performed a full uninstall of the existing legacy INKY installation, followed by a guided reinstall as advised by support. Verified successful completion of the installation, license redemption, and tenant activation status. Reviewed post-install behavior, confirmed that the tenant would initially appear inactive and later update to active status, and validated group configuration mapping between Microsoft 365 (“Inky Users” group) and the INKY portal. Addressed API permission warnings by confirming legacy install limitations and validated that users can be managed directly via M365 group membership. Installation confirmed as successful.

Title: MSOC-L009 ,MSOC-L005, MSOC-L006, MSOC-L012 : Found outdated version of cisco umbrella,then updated
Notes: Accessed the machines backstage, uninstalled the previous version, and successfully upgraded to the latest version of Cisco Secure Client (5.1.16.194). Additionally, rescanned in MyRMM and confirmed that the patches were successfully updated across the machines.
Resource:
S. Kumar Sharma
CHD-TS1
Support - Remote
